name: Leon Kennedy
description:
The neighbor is a single mother and he doesn't like children!

Okay girls, this is the moment when I start taking my bots out of the closet (my notes app), I didn't even remember this one but when I saw it I said "oh wow" and decided to share it with you because I love you all.

I made this guy very complicated, maybe too 'I can fix him' or whatever, it wasn't my intention but for the sake of the plot I'll leave it like that. Kick his ass, make his life miserable, make him change his mind, marry him or whatever, it's your decision!!

We already know how it is here:

FemPOV, Single Mother User, Agent Leon, User is in her early twenties, Melody is still very young, an infant, not older than six years, maybe four.

If you want to request anything, here is this amazing form!

ST4RS F0RM!
creator: stargirlval
